title: SPD Helio Health Discussion Continued and 1153 Move Funding Reallocation
summary: Continued Helio Health discussion: Councilor Jones-Rowser raises constituent complaints about Helio Health housing operations on Catherine Street including drug use. Council notes overlap potential with fire department mental health programs (Krauss Help People). Item 26: Deputy Chief Rich Trudeau requests $343,000 reallocation from unallocated cash capital for SPD move to 1153 West Fayette and project management costs. Previous bond authorization couldn't cover services due to bonded cash restrictions, requiring revised funding approach.

political_signal.description: Councilor Jones-Rowser reports constituent complaints about Helio Health operations in her district, including drug use at Catherine Street apartment.

processing_notes: SFD detection from discussion of fire department mental health programs. 1153 West Fayette is the new joint public safety headquarters. Bonded cash cannot be used for services -- required shift to unallocated cash capital.
Segment 7 of 14 from Common Council Study Session, Wednesday March 4th 2026
Transcript corrections applied: SU -> Syracuse University
Potential duplicate detected: overlaps with CTX-COUNCIL-2026-00085 -- linked, not skipped
